message:
test(frankenterm-core): add wide char, cursor boundary, and erase bg fixtures

Add 8 VT conformance fixtures for high-priority coverage gaps:
- Wide chars: overwrite lead/continuation with narrow char, consecutive
- Cursor: CUU at top boundary, CUD past bottom (clamping), CUP home
- Tab: behavior when all tab stops cleared
- Erase: ED 2 (erase all) uses current background color

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,32 @@
+{
+  "name": "cup_home_no_params",
+  "description": "CUP with no parameters homes cursor to (0,0)",
+  "initial_size": [
+    10,
+    3
+  ],
+  "input_bytes_hex": "58595a1b5b48",
+  "expected": {
+    "cursor": {
+      "row": 0,
+      "col": 0
+    },
+    "cells": [
+      {
+        "row": 0,
+        "col": 0,
+        "char": "X"
+      },
+      {
+        "row": 0,
+        "col": 1,
+        "char": "Y"
+      },
+      {
+        "row": 0,
+        "col": 2,
+        "char": "Z"
+      }
+    ]
+  }
+}

@@ -0,0 +1,27 @@
+{
+  "name": "consecutive_wide_chars",
+  "description": "Multiple consecutive wide chars render at successive double-width positions",
+  "initial_size": [
+    10,
+    3
+  ],
+  "input_bytes_hex": "e4b896e7958c",
+  "expected": {
+    "cursor": {
+      "row": 0,
+      "col": 4
+    },
+    "cells": [
+      {
+        "row": 0,
+        "col": 0,
+        "char": "\u4e16"
+      },
+      {
+        "row": 0,
+        "col": 2,
+        "char": "\u754c"
+      }
+    ]
+  }
+}

@@ -0,0 +1,27 @@
+{
+  "name": "overwrite_continuation_with_narrow",
+  "description": "Printing over continuation cell of wide char blanks the lead cell",
+  "initial_size": [
+    10,
+    3
+  ],
+  "input_bytes_hex": "e4b8961b5b313b324859",
+  "expected": {
+    "cursor": {
+      "row": 0,
+      "col": 2
+    },
+    "cells": [
+      {
+        "row": 0,
+        "col": 0,
+        "char": " "
+      },
+      {
+        "row": 0,
+        "col": 1,
+        "char": "Y"
+      }
+    ]
+  }
+}

@@ -0,0 +1,27 @@
+{
+  "name": "overwrite_wide_with_narrow",
+  "description": "Printing narrow char over lead of wide char clears continuation cell",
+  "initial_size": [
+    10,
+    3
+  ],
+  "input_bytes_hex": "e4b8961b5b313b314858",
+  "expected": {
+    "cursor": {
+      "row": 0,
+      "col": 1
+    },
+    "cells": [
+      {
+        "row": 0,
+        "col": 0,
+        "char": "X"
+      },
+      {
+        "row": 0,
+        "col": 1,
+        "char": " "
+      }
+    ]
+  }
+}
